items.title: Boeing Gets FAA Green Light To Boost 737 Max Output After Alaska Airlines Door Plug Blowout
items.description: The FAA has approved Boeing to raise 737 Max production to 42 jets per month following Alaska Airlines door plug incident.

items.title: Boeing Just Received Good 737 MAX News. The Stock Should React Well.
items.description: Friday, the Federal Aviation Administration lifted the cap on Boeing’s 737 MAX production to 42 per month from 38.

items.title: FIDU: Industrials Dashboard For October
items.description: FIDU offers broad industrial exposure, with transportation undervalued and aerospace overvalued, while XLI shows better liquidity. Learn why FIDU ETF is a hold.
